papers.title: Imaging interface-controlled bulk oxygen spillover
papers.summary: In situ microscopic single-particle imaging demonstrates the significance of rationally engineered metal–support interfaces for activating the oxygen in bulk catalyst, helping elucidate reaction pathways in catalytic conversions
papers.abstract: As one dynamic aspect of catalysis, spillover is known as species diffusion between an active metal and its support1-3, especially in reactions involving hydrogen and oxygen4-8. Spillover confined on the catalyst surface has been investigated extensively9,10; however, it remains unclear whether the bulk catalyst participates in the reactions through non-surface spillover. Here we track the oxygen spillover in Ru/TiO2 catalysts using in situ environmental transmission electron microscopy. Lattice oxygen was found to transport directly from the TiO2 substrate to the supported Ru particles through the Ru/TiO2 interface instead of the traditionally expected surface diffusion11. As a result, the TiO2 lattice at the subsurface was strained reversibly to provide channels for oxygen transport, as detected by the picometre-precision tracing of atomic displacement. The structural adaptability at the metal-support interface is critical for controlling oxygen spillover, which is switched on in Ru/rutile-TiO2 but switched off in Ru/anatase-TiO2. As shown by the real-time atom-resolved evidence, this bulk oxygen spillover is generally viable in supported metal catalysts of an interfacial epitaxy nature and demonstrates the significance of rationally engineered metal-support interfaces for activating the oxygen in bulk catalyst to contribute to reactions.

papers.llm_title_zh: 界面调控的体相氧溢流成像
papers.llm_title_bilingual: 界面调控的体相氧溢流成像 / Imaging interface-controlled bulk oxygen spillover
papers.llm_research_question_zh: 体相催化剂中的氧是否能够通过非表面途径、即经金属-载体界面发生溢流并参与催化反应，以及金属-载体界面结构如何调控这一过程？
llm_highlights_zh: 原位环境透射电镜显示，Ru/TiO2中存在经金属-载体界面发生的体相氧溢流。
氧并非沿表面扩散，而是由TiO2晶格氧直接穿过Ru/TiO2界面输运至Ru颗粒。
金属-载体界面结构适应性决定氧溢流开关，提示可通过界面工程激活催化剂体相氧参与反应。
papers.llm_rss_summary_zh: 原位单颗粒显微成像表明，经合理工程化设计的金属-载体界面对激活催化剂体相氧至关重要，有助于阐明催化转化中的反应路径。
papers.llm_pubmed_abstract_zh: 作为催化中的一种动态过程，溢流通常指活性金属与其载体之间的物种扩散，尤其常见于涉及氢和氧的反应。既往研究已广泛关注局限于催化剂表面的溢流；然而，体相催化剂是否可通过非表面溢流参与反应，仍不清楚。本文利用原位环境透射电子显微镜追踪Ru/TiO2催化剂中的氧溢流过程。研究发现，晶格氧并非按传统预期沿表面扩散，而是直接经由Ru/TiO2界面由TiO2基底输运至负载的Ru颗粒。与此相应，TiO2次表层晶格发生可逆应变，为氧输运提供通道；这一过程通过皮米精度的原子位移追踪得到证实。金属-载体界面的结构适应性是调控氧溢流的关键：在Ru/金红石型TiO2中该过程可被开启，而在Ru/锐钛矿型TiO2中则被关闭。基于实时原子分辨证据，作者指出，这种体相氧溢流在具有界面外延特征的负载型金属催化剂中具有普遍可行性，凸显了通过合理设计金属-载体界面来激活催化剂体相氧并使其参与反应的重要意义。

papers.title: MAISNet: A Multi-Species Integrated Graph Neural Network for Acetylcholinesterase Inhibitor Screening
papers.summary: Abstract Motivation Global population aging has led to a rapid increase in neurodegenerative disorders such as alzheimer’s disease (AD). Although existing drugs can temporarily alleviate symptoms, none have been proven to delay or prevent disease progression. Acetylcholinesterase inhibitors (AChEIs) have been shown to mitigate AD symptoms, yet traditional AChEI screening approaches remain time-consuming and inefficient. Results To address this limitation, we developed MAISNet, an AChEI screening framework based on acetylcholinesterase (AChE) data from six species. In MAISNet, inhibitor molecules were represented as SMILES-derived molecular graphs, whereas AChE protein structures were encoded as residue contact maps. Multi-scale molecular and protein features were extracted using the sample and aggregate (GraphSAGE) network and the graph attention network (GAT), respectively, and were subsequently fused through a bidirectional cross-attention mechanism. The integrated representations were then processed by a multilayer perceptron (MLP) to inhibitor classification. On both internal and external validation sets, MAISNet consistently outperformed five baseline models. Furthermore, we applied MAISNet to screen existing small molecules, and Methyl 2-[(3S)-3–(1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7, 8-octahydro-2-naphthyl)-2-(methoxycarbonyl)-1H-pyrrol-1-yl]acetate subsequently emerged as the top-ranked candidate. Overall, MAISNet significantly improves the accuracy and generalization capability of AChEI screening, providing an efficient and reliable computational tool for accelerating therapeutic discovery for AD. Availability Code that supports the reported results can be found at: https://github.com/liangshengjie111/MAISNet . The archival version of the code is preserved on Zenodo at https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.18721665

papers.llm_research_question_zh: 如何利用跨物种乙酰胆碱酯酶数据与图神经网络，构建一种更高效、准确且具良好泛化能力的乙酰胆碱酯酶抑制剂筛选方法，以支持阿尔茨海默病治疗发现？
llm_highlights_zh: 提出基于六个物种乙酰胆碱酯酶数据的多物种整合图神经网络筛选框架MAISNet。
模型将小分子SMILES图与蛋白质残基接触图联合建模，并通过双向交叉注意力实现特征融合。
在内部与外部验证集中均优于5种基线模型，并筛得一个排名最高的潜在候选小分子。
papers.llm_rss_summary_zh: 研究针对传统乙酰胆碱酯酶抑制剂筛选耗时且效率不足的问题，开发了基于六个物种乙酰胆碱酯酶数据的筛选框架MAISNet。该方法将抑制剂分子表示为由SMILES构建的分子图，将乙酰胆碱酯酶蛋白结构编码为残基接触图，分别采用GraphSAGE与图注意力网络提取多尺度分子与蛋白特征，并通过双向交叉注意力机制进行融合，最终使用多层感知机完成抑制剂分类。在内部和外部验证集上，MAISNet均稳定优于5种基线模型。进一步用于现有小分子筛选时，Methyl 2-[(3S)-3–(1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7, 8-octahydro-2-naphthyl)-2-(methoxycarbonyl)-1H-pyrrol-1-yl]acetate被识别为排名最高的候选化合物。总体而言，MAISNet提升了乙酰胆碱酯酶抑制剂筛选的准确性与泛化能力，可为阿尔茨海默病治疗发现提供高效且可靠的计算工具。

papers.title: Fast prediction of protein flexibility
papers.summary: Abstract Motivation Advances in hardware have made molecular dynamics (MD) simulations of protein structures faster and more accessible to the scientific community. However, accurately estimating protein flexibility using MD remains computationally demanding, especially for large systems and long time scales. Several MD-based resources—including MdMD, the DynamD database, and more recently ATLAS and mdCATH—now provide MD trajectories for thousands of proteins, enabling the development of predictive models. Results Here, the Graphlet Degree Vector (GDV) is introduced as a lightweight, fast, and easy-to-implement linear model for predicting protein flexibility directly from atom coordinates. GDV is a 15-dimensional feature vector that captures local packing and the spatial connectivity of each atom with its nearby neighbors. Trained on a subset of globular-like proteins from the ATLAS database, the GDV model achieves a Spearman correlation of 0.828 compared to MD data. The model trained on ATLAS dataset was further evaluated on independent Nuclear Magnetic Resonance and cryo-electron microscopy datasets, demonstrating the robustness and generalizability of the GDV-based approach. A key advantage of the GDV model is that it requires no additional external or experimental data and can be applied in near real time (on the order of 10 seconds) even for large proteins with 20,000 atoms on a standard desktop or laptop. Overall, the results show that a lightweight, fast, and purely coordinate-based model can provide accurate and generalizable predictions of protein flexibility across diverse folds and sizes. Availability The source code is available in the GitHub repository https://github.com/jure-praznikar/FastProtFlex . The data required for model training are available at https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.17771418
papers.llm_title_zh: 蛋白质柔性的快速预测
papers.llm_title_bilingual: 蛋白质柔性的快速预测 / Fast prediction of protein flexibility
papers.llm_research_question_zh: 能否仅基于蛋白质原子坐标，构建一种轻量、快速且具有良好泛化能力的模型，以近实时方式准确预测蛋白质柔性，并逼近分子动力学模拟所得结果？
llm_highlights_zh: 提出基于原子坐标的15维图团度向量（GDV）线性模型，用于快速预测蛋白质柔性。
该模型在ATLAS数据集上与MD结果的Spearman相关系数达到0.828，并在独立的NMR与冷冻电镜数据集上显示出稳健性。
方法无需额外实验或外部数据，对约20,000个原子的蛋白可在普通台式机或笔记本上于约10秒内完成预测。
papers.llm_rss_summary_zh:
研究背景：尽管硬件进步使蛋白质结构的分子动力学（MD）模拟更快且更易获得，但利用MD准确估计蛋白质柔性在大体系和长时间尺度下仍具有较高计算成本。随着MdMD、DynamD、ATLAS和mdCATH等资源提供了数千种蛋白的MD轨迹，基于这些数据开发预测模型成为可能。

研究结果：本文提出图团度向量（Graphlet Degree Vector, GDV）作为一种轻量、快速且易于实现的线性模型，可直接由原子坐标预测蛋白质柔性。GDV为15维特征向量，用于刻画每个原子的局部堆积状态及其与邻近原子的空间连接关系。该模型在ATLAS数据库中一组类球状蛋白子集上训练后，与MD数据相比达到0.828的Spearman相关系数。进一步地，基于ATLAS训练的模型在独立的核磁共振（NMR）和冷冻电镜数据集上进行评估，显示出GDV方法的稳健性与可推广性。

研究意义：GDV模型的关键优势在于无需任何额外外部或实验数据，即可在接近实时的条件下应用；即使对于含20,000个原子的较大蛋白，在标准台式机或笔记本电脑上也可于约10秒内完成预测。总体结果表明，这种轻量、快速且纯坐标驱动的模型能够在不同折叠类型和分子大小的蛋白中提供准确且具有泛化能力的柔性预测。

代码与数据：源代码可见于GitHub仓库https://github.com/jure-praznikar/FastProtFlex，模型训练所需数据可由https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.17771418获取。

Several MD-based resources—including MdMD, the DynamD database, and more recently ATLAS and mdCATH—now provide MD trajectories for thousands of proteins, enabling the development of predictive models. Results Here, the Graphlet Degree Vector (GDV) is introduced as a lightweight, fast, and easy-to-implement linear model for predicting protein flexibility directly from atom coordinates. GDV is a 15-dimensional feature vector that captures local packing and the spatial connectivity of each atom with its nearby neighbors. Trained on a subset of globular-like proteins from the ATLAS database, the GDV model achieves a Spearman correlation of 0.828 compared to MD data. The model trained on ATLAS dataset was further evaluated on independent Nuclear Magnetic Resonance and cryo-electron microscopy datasets, demonstrating the robustness and generalizability of the GDV-based approach. A key advantage of the GDV model is that it requires no additional external or experimental data and can be applied in near real time (on the order of 10 seconds) even for large proteins with 20,000 atoms on a standard desktop or laptop. Overall, the results show that a lightweight, fast, and purely coordinate-based model can provide accurate and generalizable predictions of protein flexibility across diverse folds and sizes. Availability The source code is available in the GitHub repository https://github.com/jure-praznikar/FastProtFlex . The data required for model training are available at https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.17771418
papers.primary_summary_zh:
研究背景：尽管硬件进步使蛋白质结构的分子动力学（MD）模拟更快且更易获得，但利用MD准确估计蛋白质柔性在大体系和长时间尺度下仍具有较高计算成本。随着MdMD、DynamD、ATLAS和mdCATH等资源提供了数千种蛋白的MD轨迹，基于这些数据开发预测模型成为可能。

研究结果：本文提出图团度向量（Graphlet Degree Vector, GDV）作为一种轻量、快速且易于实现的线性模型，可直接由原子坐标预测蛋白质柔性。GDV为15维特征向量，用于刻画每个原子的局部堆积状态及其与邻近原子的空间连接关系。该模型在ATLAS数据库中一组类球状蛋白子集上训练后，与MD数据相比达到0.828的Spearman相关系数。进一步地，基于ATLAS训练的模型在独立的核磁共振（NMR）和冷冻电镜数据集上进行评估，显示出GDV方法的稳健性与可推广性。

研究意义：GDV模型的关键优势在于无需任何额外外部或实验数据，即可在接近实时的条件下应用；即使对于含20,000个原子的较大蛋白，在标准台式机或笔记本电脑上也可于约10秒内完成预测。总体结果表明，这种轻量、快速且纯坐标驱动的模型能够在不同折叠类型和分子大小的蛋白中提供准确且具有泛化能力的柔性预测。

代码与数据：源代码可见于GitHub仓库https://github.com/jure-praznikar/FastProtFlex，模型训练所需数据可由https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.17771418获取。

papers.title: Bidirectional Mamba-2 Boosts EEG Super-Resolution via Regression and Diffusion
papers.summary: Abstract Motivations Electroencephalography (EEG) is a non-invasive method that records brain electrical activity from scalp electrodes, offering millisecond temporal resolution but limited spatial detail due to sparse sensor layouts. Results We present DiBiMa-EEGSR, a bidirectional Mamba-2 diffusion framework for spatio-temporal EEG super-resolution that reconstructs high-resolution signals from standard low-density recordings without additional hardware. The method formulates super-resolution as conditional generative inference and integrates a diffusion process with a bidirectional state-space backbone to model long-range temporal dependencies with linear complexity. Conditioning on low-resolution inputs, electrode positions and task labels enables anatomically coherent and context-aware reconstruction. A one-step sampling strategy substantially reduces inference time while preserving fidelity. Across two public benchmarks, the approach improves reconstruction accuracy, spatial coherence and spectral preservation over convolutional, transformer-based and prior diffusion models in both spatial and temporal upsampling tasks, providing a scalable pathway toward high-resolution electrophysiological imaging. Availability and Implementation Code to reproduce ablation experiments, training and evaluation of the proposed BiMa and DiBiMa EEGSR models are available at https://github.com/UgoLomoio/DiBiMa-EEGSR.git . Model weights are available at https://huggingface.co/Ugo96/DiBiMa-EEGSR while an interactive demo for EEG spatial super-resolution using our models can be found at https://huggingface.co/spaces/Ugo96/DiBiMa-EEGSR-Demo
papers.llm_title_zh: 双向Mamba-2通过回归与扩散增强EEG超分辨率
papers.llm_title_bilingual: 双向Mamba-2通过回归与扩散增强EEG超分辨率 / Bidirectional Mamba-2 Boosts EEG Super-Resolution via Regression and Diffusion
papers.llm_research_question_zh: 如何在无需额外硬件的前提下，利用低密度EEG记录实现高分辨率时空信号重建，并同时兼顾长程时间依赖建模、空间一致性、频谱保真性与推理效率？
llm_highlights_zh: 提出DiBiMa-EEGSR双向Mamba-2扩散框架，用于从低密度EEG重建高分辨率时空信号。
方法将EEG超分辨率建模为条件生成推断，并结合电极位置与任务标签实现解剖学一致且具上下文感知的重建。
在两个公开基准上，该方法在空间与时间上采样任务中均优于卷积、Transformer及既有扩散模型，并以一步采样降低推理时间。
papers.llm_rss_summary_zh: 脑电图（EEG）是一种非侵入性记录头皮电极脑电活动的方法，具有毫秒级时间分辨率，但受限于传感器布局稀疏，其空间细节有限。本文提出DiBiMa-EEGSR，这是一种基于双向Mamba-2的扩散框架，用于EEG时空超分辨率，可在无需额外硬件的情况下，从标准低密度记录中重建高分辨率信号。该方法将超分辨率表述为条件生成推断问题，将扩散过程与双向状态空间骨干网络相结合，以线性复杂度建模长程时间依赖。通过对低分辨率输入、电极位置和任务标签进行条件约束，模型可实现解剖学一致且具上下文感知的重建。一步采样策略在保持重建保真度的同时显著降低了推理时间。在两个公开基准数据集上，该方法在空间与时间上采样任务中，相较卷积模型、基于Transformer的方法以及既有扩散模型，均提升了重建准确性、空间一致性和频谱保持能力，为高分辨率电生理成像提供了可扩展路径。

all_papers.title: MAISNet: A Multi-Species Integrated Graph Neural Network for Acetylcholinesterase Inhibitor Screening
all_papers.summary: Abstract Motivation Global population aging has led to a rapid increase in neurodegenerative disorders such as alzheimer’s disease (AD). Although existing drugs can temporarily alleviate symptoms, none have been proven to delay or prevent disease progression. Acetylcholinesterase inhibitors (AChEIs) have been shown to mitigate AD symptoms, yet traditional AChEI screening approaches remain time-consuming and inefficient. Results To address this limitation, we developed MAISNet, an AChEI screening framework based on acetylcholinesterase (AChE) data from six species. In MAISNet, inhibitor molecules were represented as SMILES-derived molecular graphs, whereas AChE protein structures were encoded as residue contact maps. Multi-scale molecular and protein features were extracted using the sample and aggregate (GraphSAGE) network and the graph attention network (GAT), respectively, and were subsequently fused through a bidirectional cross-attention mechanism. The integrated representations were then processed by a multilayer perceptron (MLP) to inhibitor classification. On both internal and external validation sets, MAISNet consistently outperformed five baseline models. Furthermore, we applied MAISNet to screen existing small molecules, and Methyl 2-[(3S)-3–(1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7, 8-octahydro-2-naphthyl)-2-(methoxycarbonyl)-1H-pyrrol-1-yl]acetate subsequently emerged as the top-ranked candidate. Overall, MAISNet significantly improves the accuracy and generalization capability of AChEI screening, providing an efficient and reliable computational tool for accelerating therapeutic discovery for AD. Availability Code that supports the reported results can be found at: https://github.com/liangshengjie111/MAISNet . The archival version of the code is preserved on Zenodo at https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.18721665

llm_highlights_zh: 提出基于六个物种乙酰胆碱酯酶数据的多物种整合图神经网络筛选框架MAISNet。
模型将小分子SMILES图与蛋白质残基接触图联合建模，并通过双向交叉注意力实现特征融合。
在内部与外部验证集中均优于5种基线模型，并筛得一个排名最高的潜在候选小分子。
all_papers.llm_rss_summary_zh: 研究针对传统乙酰胆碱酯酶抑制剂筛选耗时且效率不足的问题，开发了基于六个物种乙酰胆碱酯酶数据的筛选框架MAISNet。该方法将抑制剂分子表示为由SMILES构建的分子图，将乙酰胆碱酯酶蛋白结构编码为残基接触图，分别采用GraphSAGE与图注意力网络提取多尺度分子与蛋白特征，并通过双向交叉注意力机制进行融合，最终使用多层感知机完成抑制剂分类。在内部和外部验证集上，MAISNet均稳定优于5种基线模型。进一步用于现有小分子筛选时，Methyl 2-[(3S)-3–(1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7, 8-octahydro-2-naphthyl)-2-(methoxycarbonyl)-1H-pyrrol-1-yl]acetate被识别为排名最高的候选化合物。总体而言，MAISNet提升了乙酰胆碱酯酶抑制剂筛选的准确性与泛化能力，可为阿尔茨海默病治疗发现提供高效且可靠的计算工具。

all_papers.title: Imaging interface-controlled bulk oxygen spillover
all_papers.summary: In situ microscopic single-particle imaging demonstrates the significance of rationally engineered metal–support interfaces for activating the oxygen in bulk catalyst, helping elucidate reaction pathways in catalytic conversions
all_papers.abstract: As one dynamic aspect of catalysis, spillover is known as species diffusion between an active metal and its support1-3, especially in reactions involving hydrogen and oxygen4-8. Spillover confined on the catalyst surface has been investigated extensively9,10; however, it remains unclear whether the bulk catalyst participates in the reactions through non-surface spillover. Here we track the oxygen spillover in Ru/TiO2 catalysts using in situ environmental transmission electron microscopy. Lattice oxygen was found to transport directly from the TiO2 substrate to the supported Ru particles through the Ru/TiO2 interface instead of the traditionally expected surface diffusion11. As a result, the TiO2 lattice at the subsurface was strained reversibly to provide channels for oxygen transport, as detected by the picometre-precision tracing of atomic displacement. The structural adaptability at the metal-support interface is critical for controlling oxygen spillover, which is switched on in Ru/rutile-TiO2 but switched off in Ru/anatase-TiO2. As shown by the real-time atom-resolved evidence, this bulk oxygen spillover is generally viable in supported metal catalysts of an interfacial epitaxy nature and demonstrates the significance of rationally engineered metal-support interfaces for activating the oxygen in bulk catalyst to contribute to reactions.

all_papers.llm_research_question_zh: 体相催化剂中的氧是否能够通过非表面途径、即经金属-载体界面发生溢流并参与催化反应，以及金属-载体界面结构如何调控这一过程？
llm_highlights_zh: 原位环境透射电镜显示，Ru/TiO2中存在经金属-载体界面发生的体相氧溢流。
氧并非沿表面扩散，而是由TiO2晶格氧直接穿过Ru/TiO2界面输运至Ru颗粒。
金属-载体界面结构适应性决定氧溢流开关，提示可通过界面工程激活催化剂体相氧参与反应。
all_papers.llm_rss_summary_zh: 原位单颗粒显微成像表明，经合理工程化设计的金属-载体界面对激活催化剂体相氧至关重要，有助于阐明催化转化中的反应路径。
all_papers.llm_pubmed_abstract_zh: 作为催化中的一种动态过程，溢流通常指活性金属与其载体之间的物种扩散，尤其常见于涉及氢和氧的反应。既往研究已广泛关注局限于催化剂表面的溢流；然而，体相催化剂是否可通过非表面溢流参与反应，仍不清楚。本文利用原位环境透射电子显微镜追踪Ru/TiO2催化剂中的氧溢流过程。研究发现，晶格氧并非按传统预期沿表面扩散，而是直接经由Ru/TiO2界面由TiO2基底输运至负载的Ru颗粒。与此相应，TiO2次表层晶格发生可逆应变，为氧输运提供通道；这一过程通过皮米精度的原子位移追踪得到证实。金属-载体界面的结构适应性是调控氧溢流的关键：在Ru/金红石型TiO2中该过程可被开启，而在Ru/锐钛矿型TiO2中则被关闭。基于实时原子分辨证据，作者指出，这种体相氧溢流在具有界面外延特征的负载型金属催化剂中具有普遍可行性，凸显了通过合理设计金属-载体界面来激活催化剂体相氧并使其参与反应的重要意义。

all_papers.primary_summary_raw: As one dynamic aspect of catalysis, spillover is known as species diffusion between an active metal and its support1-3, especially in reactions involving hydrogen and oxygen4-8. Spillover confined on the catalyst surface has been investigated extensively9,10; however, it remains unclear whether the bulk catalyst participates in the reactions through non-surface spillover. Here we track the oxygen spillover in Ru/TiO2 catalysts using in situ environmental transmission electron microscopy. Lattice oxygen was found to transport directly from the TiO2 substrate to the supported Ru particles through the Ru/TiO2 interface instead of the traditionally expected surface diffusion11. As a result, the TiO2 lattice at the subsurface was strained reversibly to provide channels for oxygen transport, as detected by the picometre-precision tracing of atomic displacement. The structural adaptability at the metal-support interface is critical for controlling oxygen spillover, which is switched on in Ru/rutile-TiO2 but switched off in Ru/anatase-TiO2. As shown by the real-time atom-resolved evidence, this bulk oxygen spillover is generally viable in supported metal catalysts of an interfacial epitaxy nature and demonstrates the significance of rationally engineered metal-support interfaces for activating the oxygen in bulk catalyst to contribute to reactions.

all_papers.title: Fast prediction of protein flexibility
all_papers.summary: Abstract Motivation Advances in hardware have made molecular dynamics (MD) simulations of protein structures faster and more accessible to the scientific community. However, accurately estimating protein flexibility using MD remains computationally demanding, especially for large systems and long time scales. Several MD-based resources—including MdMD, the DynamD database, and more recently ATLAS and mdCATH—now provide MD trajectories for thousands of proteins, enabling the development of predictive models. Results Here, the Graphlet Degree Vector (GDV) is introduced as a lightweight, fast, and easy-to-implement linear model for predicting protein flexibility directly from atom coordinates. GDV is a 15-dimensional feature vector that captures local packing and the spatial connectivity of each atom with its nearby neighbors. Trained on a subset of globular-like proteins from the ATLAS database, the GDV model achieves a Spearman correlation of 0.828 compared to MD data. The model trained on ATLAS dataset was further evaluated on independent Nuclear Magnetic Resonance and cryo-electron microscopy datasets, demonstrating the robustness and generalizability of the GDV-based approach. A key advantage of the GDV model is that it requires no additional external or experimental data and can be applied in near real time (on the order of 10 seconds) even for large proteins with 20,000 atoms on a standard desktop or laptop. Overall, the results show that a lightweight, fast, and purely coordinate-based model can provide accurate and generalizable predictions of protein flexibility across diverse folds and sizes. Availability The source code is available in the GitHub repository https://github.com/jure-praznikar/FastProtFlex . The data required for model training are available at https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.17771418
all_papers.llm_title_zh: 蛋白质柔性的快速预测
all_papers.llm_title_bilingual: 蛋白质柔性的快速预测 / Fast prediction of protein flexibility
all_papers.llm_research_question_zh: 能否仅基于蛋白质原子坐标，构建一种轻量、快速且具有良好泛化能力的模型，以近实时方式准确预测蛋白质柔性，并逼近分子动力学模拟所得结果？
llm_highlights_zh: 提出基于原子坐标的15维图团度向量（GDV）线性模型，用于快速预测蛋白质柔性。
该模型在ATLAS数据集上与MD结果的Spearman相关系数达到0.828，并在独立的NMR与冷冻电镜数据集上显示出稳健性。
方法无需额外实验或外部数据，对约20,000个原子的蛋白可在普通台式机或笔记本上于约10秒内完成预测。
all_papers.llm_rss_summary_zh:
研究背景：尽管硬件进步使蛋白质结构的分子动力学（MD）模拟更快且更易获得，但利用MD准确估计蛋白质柔性在大体系和长时间尺度下仍具有较高计算成本。随着MdMD、DynamD、ATLAS和mdCATH等资源提供了数千种蛋白的MD轨迹，基于这些数据开发预测模型成为可能。

研究结果：本文提出图团度向量（Graphlet Degree Vector, GDV）作为一种轻量、快速且易于实现的线性模型，可直接由原子坐标预测蛋白质柔性。GDV为15维特征向量，用于刻画每个原子的局部堆积状态及其与邻近原子的空间连接关系。该模型在ATLAS数据库中一组类球状蛋白子集上训练后，与MD数据相比达到0.828的Spearman相关系数。进一步地，基于ATLAS训练的模型在独立的核磁共振（NMR）和冷冻电镜数据集上进行评估，显示出GDV方法的稳健性与可推广性。

研究意义：GDV模型的关键优势在于无需任何额外外部或实验数据，即可在接近实时的条件下应用；即使对于含20,000个原子的较大蛋白，在标准台式机或笔记本电脑上也可于约10秒内完成预测。总体结果表明，这种轻量、快速且纯坐标驱动的模型能够在不同折叠类型和分子大小的蛋白中提供准确且具有泛化能力的柔性预测。

代码与数据：源代码可见于GitHub仓库https://github.com/jure-praznikar/FastProtFlex，模型训练所需数据可由https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.17771418获取。

all_papers.title: Bidirectional Mamba-2 Boosts EEG Super-Resolution via Regression and Diffusion
all_papers.summary: Abstract Motivations Electroencephalography (EEG) is a non-invasive method that records brain electrical activity from scalp electrodes, offering millisecond temporal resolution but limited spatial detail due to sparse sensor layouts. Results We present DiBiMa-EEGSR, a bidirectional Mamba-2 diffusion framework for spatio-temporal EEG super-resolution that reconstructs high-resolution signals from standard low-density recordings without additional hardware. The method formulates super-resolution as conditional generative inference and integrates a diffusion process with a bidirectional state-space backbone to model long-range temporal dependencies with linear complexity. Conditioning on low-resolution inputs, electrode positions and task labels enables anatomically coherent and context-aware reconstruction. A one-step sampling strategy substantially reduces inference time while preserving fidelity. Across two public benchmarks, the approach improves reconstruction accuracy, spatial coherence and spectral preservation over convolutional, transformer-based and prior diffusion models in both spatial and temporal upsampling tasks, providing a scalable pathway toward high-resolution electrophysiological imaging. Availability and Implementation Code to reproduce ablation experiments, training and evaluation of the proposed BiMa and DiBiMa EEGSR models are available at https://github.com/UgoLomoio/DiBiMa-EEGSR.git . Model weights are available at https://huggingface.co/Ugo96/DiBiMa-EEGSR while an interactive demo for EEG spatial super-resolution using our models can be found at https://huggingface.co/spaces/Ugo96/DiBiMa-EEGSR-Demo
all_papers.llm_title_zh: 双向Mamba-2通过回归与扩散增强EEG超分辨率
all_papers.llm_title_bilingual: 双向Mamba-2通过回归与扩散增强EEG超分辨率 / Bidirectional Mamba-2 Boosts EEG Super-Resolution via Regression and Diffusion
all_papers.llm_research_question_zh: 如何在无需额外硬件的前提下，利用低密度EEG记录实现高分辨率时空信号重建，并同时兼顾长程时间依赖建模、空间一致性、频谱保真性与推理效率？
llm_highlights_zh: 提出DiBiMa-EEGSR双向Mamba-2扩散框架，用于从低密度EEG重建高分辨率时空信号。
方法将EEG超分辨率建模为条件生成推断，并结合电极位置与任务标签实现解剖学一致且具上下文感知的重建。
在两个公开基准上，该方法在空间与时间上采样任务中均优于卷积、Transformer及既有扩散模型，并以一步采样降低推理时间。
all_papers.llm_rss_summary_zh: 脑电图（EEG）是一种非侵入性记录头皮电极脑电活动的方法，具有毫秒级时间分辨率，但受限于传感器布局稀疏，其空间细节有限。本文提出DiBiMa-EEGSR，这是一种基于双向Mamba-2的扩散框架，用于EEG时空超分辨率，可在无需额外硬件的情况下，从标准低密度记录中重建高分辨率信号。该方法将超分辨率表述为条件生成推断问题，将扩散过程与双向状态空间骨干网络相结合，以线性复杂度建模长程时间依赖。通过对低分辨率输入、电极位置和任务标签进行条件约束，模型可实现解剖学一致且具上下文感知的重建。一步采样策略在保持重建保真度的同时显著降低了推理时间。在两个公开基准数据集上，该方法在空间与时间上采样任务中，相较卷积模型、基于Transformer的方法以及既有扩散模型，均提升了重建准确性、空间一致性和频谱保持能力，为高分辨率电生理成像提供了可扩展路径。

all_papers.primary_summary_raw: Abstract Motivations Electroencephalography (EEG) is a non-invasive method that records brain electrical activity from scalp electrodes, offering millisecond temporal resolution but limited spatial detail due to sparse sensor layouts. Results We present DiBiMa-EEGSR, a bidirectional Mamba-2 diffusion framework for spatio-temporal EEG super-resolution that reconstructs high-resolution signals from standard low-density recordings without additional hardware. The method formulates super-resolution as conditional generative inference and integrates a diffusion process with a bidirectional state-space backbone to model long-range temporal dependencies with linear complexity. Conditioning on low-resolution inputs, electrode positions and task labels enables anatomically coherent and context-aware reconstruction. A one-step sampling strategy substantially reduces inference time while preserving fidelity. Across two public benchmarks, the approach improves reconstruction accuracy, spatial coherence and spectral preservation over convolutional, transformer-based and prior diffusion models in both spatial and temporal upsampling tasks, providing a scalable pathway toward high-resolution electrophysiological imaging. Availability and Implementation Code to reproduce ablation experiments, training and evaluation of the proposed BiMa and DiBiMa EEGSR models are available at https://github.com/UgoLomoio/DiBiMa-EEGSR.git . Model weights are available at https://huggingface.co/Ugo96/DiBiMa-EEGSR while an interactive demo for EEG spatial super-resolution using our models can be found at https://huggingface.co/spaces/Ugo96/DiBiMa-EEGSR-Demo

all_papers.title: A series of spontaneously blinking dyes for super-resolution microscopy
all_papers.summary: A series of spontaneously blinking dyes in the far-red range facilitate single-molecule localization microscopy. These dyes vary in their blinking properties and can be matched to the applications and microscopy modalities as needed
all_papers.llm_title_zh: 一系列用于超分辨率显微镜的自发闪烁染料
all_papers.llm_title_bilingual: 一系列用于超分辨率显微镜的自发闪烁染料 / A series of spontaneously blinking dyes for super-resolution microscopy
all_papers.llm_research_question_zh: 如何开发并系统提供一系列远红光自发闪烁染料，以满足单分子定位显微镜及不同超分辨率成像模式对荧光闪烁性能的差异化需求？
llm_highlights_zh: 研究报道了一系列适用于超分辨率显微镜的自发闪烁染料。
该系列染料位于远红光范围，并在闪烁特性上存在差异。
不同染料可根据具体应用需求与显微成像模式进行匹配选择。
all_papers.llm_rss_summary_zh: 本文报道了一系列远红光自发闪烁染料，可促进单分子定位显微镜成像。这些染料在闪烁性质方面各不相同，因此可根据具体应用场景和显微成像模式进行针对性匹配。
